# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Self Hosted Runner 2
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 */1 * * *'  
jobs:  
  test-deployment:  
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:  
      - name: Clone Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Get Python version 3.7.6 from .venv
        run: source .venv/bin/activate && which python
      - name: Setup Python
        run: source .venv/bin/activate && pip install pyyaml==5.4.1
      - name: Generate YAML
        uses: michaelawyu/yaml-code-generator@v0
        with:
          yaml_code: |
            ---  
            deployment: 
              type : {{.deploymentType}}
            environmentVariables:
              branch: "{{.branchName}}"
